title: Change Date Format
excerpt: Hi - I want to change the format of the Date column type from Month - DD to YYYY-MM-DD. I’m not a coder - I just want a button or menu item I can click and select or type the format. Thanks if you can help!

posts.author: Phil-Sheppard (Phil Sheppard)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I want to change the format of the Date column type from Month - DD to YYYY-MM-DD. I’m not a coder - I just want a button or menu item I can click and select or type the format. Thanks if you can help!

posts.author: ajwhitman (AJ W)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know if this feature is available, but I would also be interested in having this option!

posts.author: madeline (Madeline Lynch)
posts.cookedHtml:
You do have some customization options in the column settings, but not specifically YYY-MM-DD.

Screen Shot 2021-05-04 at 9.47.43 AM702×698 32.2 KB

If this was crucial to your board you could use a formula column to output this format:

Screen Shot 2021-05-04 at 9.46.57 AM914×566 27.6 KB

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
